versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish edraft runs/e20-elicit-fit.json --kind other --note E20: card-priority table elicited from draft_s{0,1,2} via neutral-context (round0, empty deck) 3-way comparisons, spliced onto census-derived curve_target [2,4,7,4,5,3,3,2] and BalancedDraftPolicy's original context weights (w_need=3.0, w_creature=2.0). Zero-inference draft policy. Pilot (10x10): reactive +0.107 [0.057,0.158] vs ppo:b0k_s0 (67% of E18b net's +0.16); planner +0.06 [0.037,0.085] vs vbeam ens (matches E18b's confirmed 0.978). Not gated/confirmed at full scale -- usable draft option, not a recipe of record. --parent ldraft@1 --meta {"held_out_acc": 0.7212, "pilot_reactive_delta": 0.1067, "pilot_planner_delta": 0.06}
versions.note: E20: card-priority table elicited from draft_s{0,1,2} via neutral-context (round0, empty deck) 3-way comparisons, spliced onto census-derived curve_target [2,4,7,4,5,3,3,2] and BalancedDraftPolicy's original context weights (w_need=3.0, w_creature=2.0).
